item.title: Docker Service Configuration
item.author: Author
item.description: Check Service Status 1 systemctl start docker 1 systemctl status docker 1 systemctl stop docker 1 systemctl restart docker Start Manually 1 dockerd Start Manually With Debug 1 dockerd --debug Docker Using Unix Socket 1 /var/run/docker.sock Start Manually With Host 1 dockerd --debug --host=tcp:192.168.1.10:2375 Docker CLI Client Configuration 1 export DOCKER_HOST="tcp://192.

item.title: Kubernetes Configuration Process
item.author: Author
item.description: Process Format of Configuration Type Format Local YAML Live YAML Last Applied JSON
